title: subworkflow - expand multi region service loss scale to protect slo
description: Enterprise expansion subworkflow for fear theme `multi-region-service-loss` and pattern `scale-to-protect-slo`.\n\nDesigned to improve workflow adoption by automating reliability, security, and governance controls with explicit wait and verification.
guide:
## 🧩 Enterprise Expansion Subworkflow

### 🎯 Enterprise Concern
- **multi region service loss**

### 🛠️ Pattern
- **scale to protect slo**

### ⚙️ Primary Action
- **dynatrace.aws.connector:ssm-send-command**

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Execute action
- ⏳ Wait for stabilization
- ✅ Check terminal status and fail on unsuccessful outcome

### 🧠 Why This Matters
- Helps enterprise teams automate high-friction operational controls and reduce outage risk.

wait-for-action.name: wait-for-action
wait-for-action.description: Wait for action to reach terminal state.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final status verification and fail-on-error gate.
